response.justification: While an accomplished full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship principles, Bogdan lacks the critical C++ depth required—only 6 months of direct C++ experience versus the 8–12 year requirement. He has no background in industrial automation, embedded systems, or industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), and his 10-year career trajectory focuses on web/cloud technologies rather than systems programming, making him fundamentally misaligned with a role requiring hands-on C++ architecture and industrial IoT development.
strengths: Extensive 19-year software engineering background with proven progression to staff/senior levels
Strong software craftsmanship mindset with demonstrated expertise in TDD, clean architecture, and testing-first approaches
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, talks, and teaching initiatives
concerns: Only 6 months of direct C++ experience (National Instruments 2014–2015) when role requires 8–12 years of C++ expertise
No background in industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT devices, or industrial control systems
No evidence of security standards knowledge (IEC 62443, SDL, secure coding practices for industrial/critical systems)
